title: No convention governs op/script/CLI surface topology + duplication
description: No convention governs which surfaces a capability lives on (op/script/CLI topology + duplication). DEC-0011 (retire op-twin scripts; ops op-only, CLI as reflected shell) was decided in this domain without a governing convention.

evidence.reference: conventions block has no rule covering surface topology / duplication

proposed_resolution: Author a convention governing op/script/CLI surface topology; re-point DEC-0011 to item_governed_by_convention; close this gap.
